n: Instance: The Prisoner of Sammath Baul

steps.t: Morven is in the chamber on the upper floor of Sammath Baul. Morven is waiting to give you your instructions.
Morven is in the upper chamber of Sammath Baul. You have cleared the blood-leeches from Sammath Baul, for the time being, and should report now to Mor…
Tarkrîp Orcs and Lozudurkh the Gorthorog can be found sleeping throughout Sammath Baul. Morven has sent you to awaken Lozudurkh and all the sleeping T…
Morven is on the upper floor of the tower. You have awakened all the sleeping guards and should return now to Morven.
Morven is in the chamber on the upper floor of Sammath Baul. Amarthiel has finished her interrogation, and Morven now wishes to speak with you.
Laerdan is in a state of thrall in the chamber on the upper floor of Sammath Baul. Morven has commanded you to bring Laerdan back to his cell.
